name: Koushry (Rice & Lentils)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put lentils in one pot and rice in another.
2. Pour enough boiling water over the lentils to cover them completely.
3. Add 1½ cups boiling water to the rice.
4. Simmer both pots covered on low heat for 20 minutes.
5. Drain the lentils and combine with the rice in a large pot.
6. Add salt and another ½ cup of water.
7. Cover and simmer for 15 to 20 minutes until both rice and lentils are tender.
8. Meanwhile, fry onions in oil until golden brown.
9. Stir the fried onions into the rice before serving.
